ai_project_generation_attempts_model_ref.name: ai_project_generation_attempts_model_reference_exclusive
ai_project_generation_attempts_model_ref.value: NOT ("ai_project_generation_attempts"."catalog_model_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ai_project_generation_attempts"."custom_model_id" IS NOT NULL)

ai_project_messages_model_reference_excl.name: ai_project_messages_model_reference_exclusive
ai_project_messages_model_reference_excl.value: NOT ("ai_project_messages"."catalog_model_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ai_project_messages"."custom_model_id" IS NOT NULL)

aux_node_layers_not_deleted_or_has_paylo.name: aux_node_layers_not_deleted_or_has_payload
aux_node_layers_not_deleted_or_has_paylo.value: "aux_node_layers"."is_deleted" = 1 OR "aux_node_layers"."parent_aux_node_id" IS NOT NULL OR "aux_node_layers"."name" IS NOT NULL OR "aux_node_layers"."content" IS NOT NULL OR "aux_node_layers"."symlink_target_aux_node_id" IS NOT NULL
